title: Number Of Ways To Reconstruct A Tree

testcases.input: pairs = [[1,2],[2,3]] Output: 1 Explanation: There is exactly one valid rooted tree, which is shown in the above figure.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: There is exactly one valid rooted tree, which is shown in the above figure.

testcases.input: pairs = [[1,2],[2,3],[1,3]] Output: 2 Explanation: There are multiple valid rooted trees. Three of them are shown in the above figures.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: There are multiple valid rooted trees. Three of them are shown in the above figures.

testcases.input: pairs = [[1,2],[2,3],[2,4],[1,5]] Output: 0 Explanation: There are no valid rooted trees.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: There are no valid rooted trees.
